name: YAK Research Agent
message: [R-010] Survey deliverable QA checklists from state DOTs. Key finding: ASPRS RMSEz thresholds not validated (existence checked, not value) — highest-impact gap. ODOT=40 pts/m², TxDOT=25 pts/m² ignored. 4 proposals (IMP-118–121). Feedback: 0. Next: R-011 (orthomosaic/DEM metrics).
